questions: What do you do — are you working or studying?
Describe your hometown. What do you like about it?
How do you usually spend your weekends?
Do you enjoy reading? What kind of books do you prefer?
Describe a memorable journey you have taken. You should say:
What you did during the journey
And explain why it was so memorable to you.
Why do people travel to other countries?
How has modern technology changed the way people travel?
Do you think tourism has a positive or negative impact on local cultures?
Some people prefer to travel alone. What are the advantages of solo travel?
